title: 'It's not true.' Trump's reasons for Iran attacks questioned
shortDescription: Donald Trump says Iran was close to developing nuclear weapons and ballistic missiles capable of striking the U.S. Analysts say that's not true.

title: See inside situation rooms as Trump, Vance monitor US attack on Iran
shortDescription: Photos show President Donald Trump and Vice President JD Vance in the Situation Room and at Mar-a-Lago during U.S. military operations in Iran.

title: Iran Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei killed in strikes, Trump says
shortDescription: Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was killed in joint strikes on Iran, an Israeli source confirmed to USA TODAY.

title: Are the US and Israel at war with Iran if Congress hasn't declared it?
shortDescription: The U.S. Constitution gives Congress the sole power to declare war, but since 1973, every president has used the War Powers Act.

title: US strikes Iran: Trump’s endgame — stop nukes or spark war
shortDescription: US strikes Iran as President Trump gambles on ending nuclear ambitions, risking a wider war and testing whether Americans are on board.

title: Where does Congress stand on Iran strike: Top leaders divided
shortDescription: Congress divided along party lines to the strikes on Iran, with Republicans largely supporting Trump and Democrats calling for an authorization vote.

title: Trump called for more alien files. UFO disclosure bill passed in 2023
shortDescription: President Donald Trump criticized Barack Obama for his comments on aliens. Then, he said we should release more files. Joe Biden signed disclosure bill.

title: Will Trump end daylight saving time? Here's what he has said
shortDescription: After President Donald Trump voiced support for eliminating daylight saving time in 2019, he later called it a “50-50 issue.”

title: Trump: US will 'destroy' Iran's missile program
shortDescription: The U.S. aims to wipe out Iran's ballistic missile program, prevent it from obtaining a nuclear weapon and help its people seize control, Trump said.

title: Trump puts immigration front and center. How will it impact midterms?
shortDescription: Trump twice rode a hardline immigration message to the White House, but his signature subject increasingly is a liability with voters.
